_meta.name: icd10_common
_meta.title: ICD-10-CM common diagnosis codes (sample)
_meta.source: WHO/CMS ICD-10-CM (documented sample of common diagnosis codes)
_meta.disclaimer: A small documented sample of frequently used ICD-10-CM codes for validation and examples. It is NOT the full ICD-10 code system (tens of thousands of codes); a code's absence here means 'review', not 'invalid', so this is validated at warning severity.
